caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with text on it. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls behind him. To his right, there is a clothing store display with mannequins and racks of clothes, suggesting that the recording might be taking place in a multi-purpose space. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly sharing insights or stories related to the theme of the podcast. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, conducive to an open dialogue.
